entries.source:
Chat Edit: 'PHASE 2: String Formatting Engine
  Timeline: 2-3 weeks
  Features: Printf-style format strings, locale support
  Impact:   2x developer satisfaction

PHASE 3: Asynchronous File Operations
  Timeline: 2 weeks (after Phase 2)
  Features: QThreadPool async I/O, progress callbacks
  Impact:   1.5x app responsiveness

  ### Immediate (Phase 2 Complete)
  1. ✅ Verify CMakeLists.txt includes all files
  2. ✅ Run compilation test (MASM → object files)
  3. ✅ Link against Qt6 libraries
  4. ✅ Execute examples to verify functionality
  
  ### Short-term (Week 1-2)
  1. Integrate formatter into RawrXD-QtShell IDE
  2. Create additional format specifiers if needed
  3. Benchmark against std::format and sprintf
  4. Add formatter to project documentation
  
  ### Medium-term (Phase 3)
  1. Design pure MASM thread pool architecture
  2. Implement thread pool in assembly
  3. Create Qt wrapper classes
  4. Deliver 3+ async examples'
